segments.text: There's a lot of Arm Opening from mashing at the ledge, but...
segments.original_text: この隙の崖に暴れでアームオープンが非常に多いんですが

segments.text: They're mixing up their getup options...
segments.original_text: それを出し分けて上がってきますからね

segments.text: That's a free win! They won't reach from there!
segments.original_text: これはおいしい!距離は届かないでしょう

full_text: There's a lot of Arm Opening from mashing at the ledge, but... They're mixing up their getup options... That's a free win! They won't reach from there!
